name: Feature request

## Summary

Describe the idea.

## Why it matters

Explain how this would improve the proof-of-concept.

## Scope check

Please confirm that this suggestion does not require code, browser extension architecture, APIs, or software specifications.

- [ ] This fits the current documentation-first scope.

## Possible approach

Describe how the idea could be added or explored.

## Additional context

Add examples, links, or related discussion if useful.
